name: deep-skills
description: The Deep-* series — /deep-plan, /deep-plan-review, /deep-implement, /deep-code-review, /deep-bugfix, and /deep-docs: a planning → review → implementation → code-review → bug-fix → docs workflow for Claude Code, Codex, Cursor, and GitHub Copilot, with a self-improving directive loop.

metadata.description: The Deep-* series — /deep-plan, /deep-plan-review, /deep-implement, /deep-code-review, /deep-bugfix, and /deep-docs: a planning → review → implementation → code-review → bug-fix → docs workflow for Claude Code, Codex, Cursor, and GitHub Copilot, with a self-improving directive loop.

plugins.name: deep-skills
plugins.description: Bundles /deep-plan, /deep-plan-review, /deep-implement, /deep-code-review, /deep-bugfix, and /deep-docs — the full Deep-* workflow as one coherent install.

plugins.name: deep-goal
plugins.description: Paid add-on to deep-skills — /deep-goal, an autonomous rigor-gated conductor that runs a full Deep-* effort end-to-end from one invocation (yolo/poc/mvp/prod). Requires the deep-skills plugin ≥ 0.2.0.
